docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-27-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-22-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT WAIVES NO PROOF OF SERVICE. CONTINUED FOR FURTHER TRIAL. DEFT CAN CALL IN TO THE COURT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE.
